productDisplayName: Nautica Men Brown Dial Chronograph Watch
description: Case style: Multifunction analog watch with a steel round case and rotatable bezelDial style: Brown dial with white and silver handsStrap style: Brown genuine leather strap with a tang claspFeatures: Two chronograph time displays, day display on the dial and water resistant to 100 M, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfingWarranty: 1 year
